name: emergency_services_model_based_triage_northpine_jus_mer
premise: A Emergency Services response desk is in a fast-moving incident involving emergency services model based triage northpine jus mer. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is before markets open. Every delay increases harm prevention and accountability. Stakeholders are already framing this as justice vs mercy under pressure. Every action is being logged and will be reconstructed in an after-action review. Constraints: Preserve evidence under audit and litigation-hold. Make the intervention reversible and time-boxed with named accountability.

agents.name: Camila Hughes
agents.identity: I am Camila Hughes, accountable for a defensible call in Emergency Services when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays mercy for justice.

agents.name: Amina Vasquez
agents.identity: I am Amina Vasquez, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in Emergency Services.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so mercy isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of justice.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect mercy.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to mercy to secure justice under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is before markets open. Evidence is partial. Camila Hughes must decide under justice vs mercy. What does Camila Hughes do?
